name: Soft Ginger Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar.
2. Add the eggs and molasses, mixing well.
3. Sift together the flour and spices.
4. Alternate adding the milk mixture to the first mixture.
5. Stir in the dissolved soda.
6. Pour into a greased cake pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
